name: Thai Pomelo-And-Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Chopped red chili (or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pomelo resembles a thick-skinned, oversized grapefruit and is sweeter than regular grapefruit.
2. Peel and separate the pomelo segments. Remove and discard membranes. Gently flake the flesh. If using grapefruit, drain excess juice. Chill.
3. In a large bowl, combine the chilled pomelo and shredded chicken. Mix together chopped red chili with fish sauce, sugar, and lime juice; toss with chicken mixture.
4. Arrange salad on a bed of lettuce. Garnish with coriander leaves, peanuts, and sprinkle Crisp Fried Shallot Flakes.
5. Crisp Fried Shallot Flakes: Slice shallots into thin slices ensuring even thickness for consistent cooking. Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add shallots and fry slowly until browned and crisp, about 5 to 10 minutes. Drain on paper towel. Store in an air-tight container; keeps several weeks.
